title: allium orestis
intro: Allium orestis, also known as the Greek mountain garlic, is a species of wild garlic belonging to the Allium genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Allium orestis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Allium orestis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin infections.
